Washington Senior Living Facilities & Care Homes

22 senior living communities in Washington — pick a city on the map, or browse the list. Hover or tap a community to see where it is.

What's available in Washington

  • Assisted Living — 16 communities
  • Memory Care — 13 communities
  • Independent Living — 13 communities
  • Skilled Nursing — 6 communities
  • Small Care Home — 2 communities
  • CCRC / Life Plan — 1 community

How Washington regulates senior care

Assisted living facilities and Adult Family Homes are licensed by DSHS; Washington has one of the largest small-home (Adult Family Home) sectors in the country.

Small homes: Adult Family Homes care for up to 8 residents in a residential home — how to evaluate one.

Washington resources for families

  • Washington DSHS Aging and Long-Term Support Administration — license & inspection lookup (how to read reports)
  • Eldercare Locator — 1-800-677-1116 — free federal referral line to local aging services
  • Your local Area Agency on Aging — options counseling and help paying for care
  • Long-Term Care Ombudsman — resident advocates who know each facility's complaint history

New to this?

Start with how to choose a facility, levels of care, and what it really costs.

Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice — for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Last data review: 2026-07-11.
